summary: No whole-session JSONL parsing found and missing/corrupt files are mostly handled, but the canary leaves synthetic hook heartbeat records in the real coordination log.

findings.title: Canary cleanup omits synthetic heartbeat records written by the real hook
findings.recommendation: Run the canary against an isolated temporary GARRISON_HOME, or remove any heartbeat entries produced for canary-C/the throwaway repo from heartbeat.log during cleanup. The current cleanup only deletes repo-scoped ledgers under intents, plans, and plan-locks, while the real hook invocation can append synthetic canary records to the shared heartbeat log consumed by `coord status --tail`.
